name: Chicken Broccoli Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli until tender.
2. Arrange the cooked broccoli in a baking dish.
3. Place sliced chicken on top of the broccoli.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the cream of chicken soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice, curry powder, shredded cheese, bread crumbs, and melted margarine.
5. Pour the mixture evenly over the chicken and broccoli.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the casserole is heated through and bubbly.
